log.description: Agent and human collaborator scoped the Mamaset v3 project for the Synthesis hackathon. Identified Base Sepolia deployment, Pinata private IPFS storage, and Venice AI integration as core pillars.
log.decision: Target Venice track (private AI inference) and Open Track.

log.description: Integrated Venice API (llama-3.3-70b) as the primary AI inference provider for parenting advice and baby log NLP parsing. Implemented OpenRouter as fallback. Venice chosen for zero data-retention guarantee — critical for sensitive family data.
log.decision: callAI() helper tries Venice first, falls back to OpenRouter if key not set.

log.description: Added baby profile (personalized baby name across all interactions), NFT BaseScan links after every mint, Venice vision for auto-caption suggestion on photo upload, and bedtime story generator with custom theme prompts.
log.decision: Four features added to strengthen Venice track alignment and user experience.

log.description: Pushed open-source code to https://github.com/fionaaboud/mamaset-v3 as required by hackathon rules.
log.decision: Repository made public with .gitignore excluding .env and data files.

log.description: Agent registered on-chain via ERC-8004 through the Synthesis hackathon registration flow. On-chain identity created on Base Mainnet.
log.decision: Used claude-code harness with claude-sonnet-4-6 model.
